input: The following paragraphs each describe a set of three objects arranged in a fixed order. The statements are logically consistent within each paragraph. In a golf tournament, there were three golfers: Amy, Eli, and Eve. Eve finished above Amy. Eli finished below Amy. Which option is correct? (A) Amy finished last (B) Eli finished last (C) Eve finished last
Today is the second day of the third month of 1966. What is the date one week ago in MM/DD/YYYY? (A) 02/23/1966 (B) 02/24/1966 (C) 02/25/1966
If you follow these instructions, do you return to the starting point? Take 3 steps north. Take 3 steps south.
I have a banana, two apples, and three oranges. How many fruits do I have?
